'''Krini-shen''' was a [[Vor]] and [[Chief Council]] of [[Vortex/Legends|Vortex]]. Krini-shen made a statement when [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Gial Ackbar/Legends|Ackbar]] [[Destruction of the Cathedral of Winds|destroyed]] the [[Cathedral of Winds/Legends|Cathedral of Winds]] in [[11 ABY/Legends|11 ABY]].

{{Char-stub}}
